translations.### iOS 捷徑自動化應用場景 — 自動轉發簡訊與自動建立提醒待辦事項\n\: ### iOS Shortcut Automation Scenarios — Auto Forward SMS and Auto Create Reminders
translations.### 場景 2 — 包裹送達超商時-自動建立提醒待辦事項\n\n: ### Scenario 2 — Automatically Create Reminder When Package Arrives at Convenience Store
translations.### 場景 3 — 收到信用卡帳單郵件時-自動建立提醒待辦事項\n\n: ### Scenario 3 — Automatically Create Reminder Tasks When Receiving Credit Card Billing Emails
translations.#### 1.確認你已安裝 [郵件 App](https://apps.appl: #### 1. Make sure you have installed the [Mail App](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E9%83%B5%E4%BB%B6/id1108187098){:target="_blank"} and completed mailbox account login (Gmail is also supported)
translations.#### 2.切換到「自動化」頁籤，選擇右上角「+」，下滑找到「訊息」\n\n: #### 2. Switch to the "Automation" tab, tap the "+" at the top right, then scroll down to find "Messages"
translations.#### 4.切換到「自動化」頁籤，選擇右上角「+」，下滑找到「電子郵件」\n\: #### 4. Switch to the "Automation" tab, tap the "+" at the top right, then scroll down to find "Email"
translations.***如果要更改傳送給 XXX 對象，要先點右邊 X 移除整個 Line 動作，: ***If you want to change the recipient to XXX, first click the X on the right to remove the entire Line action, then add the Line send message action again with the new recipient.***
translations.***對象選擇通訊錄電話號碼功能在 Line 傳送訊息無效。***\n\n: ***The option to select contacts' phone numbers does not work for sending messages in Line.***
translations.***這邊如果只會出現最近四位對話對象或群組，如果沒有出現你要的目標，可以先回到: ***Here, only the most recent four chat contacts or groups will appear. If your desired target does not show up, you can first go back to Line and send a few messages to the target contact or group, then return to check again and it will appear.***
translations.**當收到電子郵件標題包含「信用卡帳單」時新增提醒事項**\n: **Add a Reminder When Receiving an Email with the Subject Containing "Credit Card Statement"**
translations.*iOS 的跨裝置訊息轉寄功能（設定 -&gt; 訊息 -&gt; 訊息轉寄）必: *iOS's cross-device message forwarding feature (Settings -> Messages -> Text Message Forwarding) only works for devices with the same Apple ID, so we use Shortcuts to forward specific messages for us.*
translations.*不確定是不是捷徑 Bug，但總之結果就是如此。*\n\n: *Not sure if this is a Shortcut bug, but this is the result anyway.*
translations.*因為暫時不支援 Regex 所以只能使用文字匹配，同前述 **每個關鍵字都要新: *Because Regex is not supported yet, only text matching can be used. As mentioned before, **each keyword requires a separate shortcut.***
translations.*網路上介紹捷徑如何使用、提供現成腳本的內容已經很多，本篇文章不多敘述。*\n\: *There are already many online resources explaining how to use Shortcuts and providing ready-made scripts, so this article will not elaborate further.*
translations.*請注意每家的格式都不一樣 Orz，有的叫「信用卡電子帳單」、「信用卡電子對帳單: *Please note that each company has a different format Orz, some call it "Credit Card Electronic Statement," "Credit Card Electronic Reconciliation Statement," and Cathay even names it "Credit Card XXXX Year X Month Electronic Statement."*
translations.- \"Message contains\": `http` ( **= All:
- "Message contains": `http` ( **= All messages with URLs will be forwarded** )  
  **Create separate shortcuts for multiple keywords.**

- Change `「Confirm Before Running」` to `「Run Immediately」`

- Click `Next`
translations.- \"Sender\": Multiple, but need to add:
- "Sender": Multiple, but need to add to contacts

- At least one of the two conditions, "Message contains" or "Sender," must be set; **therefore, you cannot handle all messages without setting any condition**.

- "Sender": Multiple, but need to add to contacts

- Other filter criteria — Account: can filter sources from iCloud or Gmail

- Other Filter Conditions — Recipients: Multiple, but must be added to Contacts, usually your own multiple accounts
translations.- \"Title contains\": `Credit Card State:
- "Title contains": `Credit Card Statement` **Multiple keywords require creating separate shortcuts.**

- Change "Confirm Before Running" to `Run Immediately`

- Click "Next"
translations.- **Add a Reminder When Receiving an Ema: - **Add a Reminder When Receiving an Email with the Subject Containing "Credit Card Statement"**
translations.- Add Reminder When Receiving SMS Contai:
- Add Reminder When Receiving SMS Containing "已在" (Coupang Uses "已在")

- Add a Reminder When Receiving an SMS Containing "Delivered" (Usually "Delivered")
translations.- Change `「不提示」` to select `「提示」`\n\n- S:
- Change `「不提示」` to select `「提示」`

- Select the `At Time "2:00 PM"` input box for `"2:00 PM"` and choose the variable `"Adjusted Date"`

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it

- After confirming everything is correct, tap "Done" at the top right corner.  
  **If tapping Done does nothing, it might be an iOS bug. You can ignore it and just tap Back to return to the home screen.**

- Change `「不提示」` to select `「提示」`

- Select the `At Time 2:00 PM` `“2:00 PM”` input box, then choose the variable `“Adjusted Date”`

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it

- No problem, tap "Done" at the top right corner.  
  **If tapping Done does nothing, it might be an iOS bug. You can ignore it and just tap Back to return to the home screen.**
translations.- Click the `Title` input box in the `If: - Click the `Title` input box in the `If "Title" "Condition"` section, change the condition to `Contains`, enter `Credit Card Statement`, and tap "Done" on the keyboard.
translations.- Click the first `「提醒事項」` input box in:
- Click the first `「Reminder」` input box in `Add "Reminder" to "Reminders" and "Do Not Notify"`.

- Swipe right to find and tap `「Repeat Items」`.

- Go back to the `Repeat Items` input box above and change the originally selected `Email` to `Title`.

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it.
translations.- Confirm the final setup result as: \n:
- Confirm the final setup result as:  
  `When I receive a message containing "XXX", take the message as input, and Line sends the "content" to "XXX"`

- No problem, tap "Done" at the top right corner.  
  **If tapping Done does nothing, it might be an iOS bug. You can ignore it and just tap Back to return to the home screen.**

- Go back to the Shortcuts automation home to view, pause, or edit this shortcut.
translations.- Drag the `If \"Repeat Result\" \"Condi:
- Drag the `If "Repeat Result" "Condition"` action inside and below `Repeat Each Item in "Shortcut Input"`

- Confirm the final location map as shown in Figure 2 above. If it is incorrect, please delete duplicates and redo from the previous step.

- Click the `“Repeat Results”` input box next to `If “Repeat Results” “Condition”`, then change the selection below to `“Title”`. Click the “X” next to the menu to close it.
translations.- First, click on the `Send \"Message\":
- First, click on the `Send "Message" to "XXX"` action, then the `"Message"` input box.

- Swipe right to find and tap `「Shortcut Input」`

- Go back to the top and click the `“Shortcut Input”` field in `“Send ‘Shortcut Input’ to ‘XXX’”`.

- Open the menu below and change the original selection from `「Messages」` to `「Content」`

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it

- Tap "Done" at the top right corner
translations.- First, click the first `「提醒事項」` input:
- First, click the first `「提醒事項」` input box in `Add "Reminder" to "Reminders" without prompting`.

- Swipe right to find and tap `「捷徑輸入」`

- Click the input box of `Shortcut Input` in `Add "Shortcut Input" to Reminders without Prompt`.

- Open the menu below and change the original selection from `「Messages」` to `「Content」`

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it
translations.- Go back to the Shortcuts automation ho: - Go back to the Shortcuts automation home to view, pause, or edit this shortcut.
translations.- In the search bar, type \"Reminder,\":
- In the search bar, type "Reminder," scroll down, and tap "Add Reminder."

- The position will still be incorrect at this time.

- Drag the action `Add "Reminder" to "Reminders" and "Do Not Notify"` under `If "Title" "Contains" "Credit Card Statement"` (inside)

- Confirm the final location map as shown in Figure 3 above. If incorrect, please delete duplicates and "if" conditions, then redo from the previous step.
translations.- In the search bar, type `“Repeat”`, sc:
- In the search bar, type `“Repeat”`, scroll down and tap `“Repeat Each”`

- After adding, it will pick the wrong variable. In the input box for `Repeat with Each Item in "Adjusted Date"`, select `Clear Variable` for `"Adjusted Date"`.

- After clearing, select `Repeat Each Item in "Items"` and in the `"Items"` input box, choose `Shortcut Input`
translations.- In the search bar, type `「提醒」`, scroll: - In the search bar, type `「Reminder」`, scroll down, and tap `「Add Reminder」`.
translations.- In the search box, type `「如果」`, scroll:
- In the search box, type `「If」`, scroll down and tap `「If」`

- The location will be incorrect at this time.
translations.- Select `“Create Blank Automation”`\n\n:
- Select `“Create Blank Automation”`

- If you want to forward messages to Line, enter `「line」` in the search box to find the shortcut function provided by Line, then select Line's `「Send Message」` and choose the target recipient.

- Select `“Create Blank Automation”`

- Search for `“Adjust Date”` in the box below.

- Select `Adjust Date`

- Select the `Date` input box for `Add 0 seconds to Date`

- In the variable selection below, choose `“Current Date”`

- Change the "seconds" input box in `Add 0 "seconds"` to `"days"`

- Enter the number of days before expiration you want to be reminded; here I enter 3 days

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it

- Select `“Create Blank Automation”`

- Search for `“Adjust Date”` in the box below.

- Select `Adjust Date`

- Select the `Date` input box for `Add 0 seconds to Date`

- In the variable selection below, choose `“Current Date”`

- `Add 0 "seconds"` change `"seconds"` to `"days"`

- Enter the number of days before expiration you want to be reminded; here I enter 3 days

- Click the "X" next to the menu to close it
translations.- Similarly, you can use the \"Send Mess: - Similarly, you can use the "Send Message" or "Send Email" action (as shown in the third image) to forward the received message content via SMS (if iCloud Messages is not enabled, SMS fees may apply) or Email.
translations.- When receiving an SMS containing \"htt:
- When receiving an SMS containing "http", forward the message "content" to me on Line

- Forward the message "content" to Line when receiving an SMS containing "Notification"

- When receiving an SMS containing "verification code," forward the message "content" to me on Line

- Forward the message "content" to Line when receiving an SMS containing "verification code"
translations.- When there is a new email and Apple Ma:
- When there is a new email and Apple Mail has finished fetching, if it contains a credit card statement title, a reminder will be created automatically!

- Because Apple Mail uses fetching (if not iCloud), email retrieval is not immediate and will be delayed for a while.

translations.[運用 Google Apps Script 轉發 Gmail 信件到 Slac: [Using Google Apps Script to Forward Gmail Messages to Slack](../d414bdbdb8c9/)
translations.```lua\nfor 信件標題 in 信件s\n if 信件標題.conta:
```lua
for emailTitle in emails
  if emailTitle.contain("Credit Card Statement") then
    Add Reminder
  else
  end 
end
```
translations.`「確認後執行」` 改成 `「立即執行」`\n: Change `「確認後執行」` to `「立即執行」`
translations.iOS 使用 捷徑 Shortcut 簡單幾個步驟自動轉發特定簡訊到 Line: iOS Using Shortcuts: Simple Steps to Automatically Forward Specific SMS to Line and Create Package Delivery Pickup & Credit Card Payment Reminders
translations.「寄件人」：多個，但要加入到聯絡人\n: "Sender": Multiple, but need to add to contacts
translations.「標題包含」： `信用卡帳單` **多個關鍵字要個別建立多個捷徑。**\n: "Title contains": `Credit Card Statement` **Multiple keywords require creating separate shortcuts.**
translations.「訊息包含」、「寄件人」兩個條件需至少則一設定， **因此無法不設條件處理所有訊: At least one of the two conditions, "Message contains" or "Sender," must be set; **therefore, you cannot handle all messages without setting any condition**.
translations.「訊息包含」： `http` ( **=有附網址的簡訊都會轉發** )\n**多:
"Message contains": `http` ( **= All messages with URLs will be forwarded** )  
**Create separate shortcuts for multiple keywords.**
translations.一樣這時候位置會是錯的\n: The position will still be incorrect at this time.
translations.下方搜尋匡搜尋 `「調整日期」`\n: Search for `「調整日期」` in the box below.
translations.下方選取變數，選擇 `「目前的日期」`\n: In the variable selection below, choose `“Current Date”`
translations.先設定提醒事項的到期日，新增一個日期變數，計算當收到訊息的時間開始 + 多少時間: First, set the reminder's due date by adding a date variable that calculates the received message time plus the desired reminder interval.
translations.先點擊 `將「提醒事項」加入「提醒事項」並不提示` ，的第一個 `「提醒事項」`: First, click the first `「提醒事項」` input box in `Add "Reminder" to "Reminders" without prompting`.
translations.先點擊 `將「訊息」傳送給「XXX」` ，的 `「訊息」` 輸入匡\n: First, click on the `Send "Message" to "XXX"` action, then the `"Message"` input box.
translations.其他過濾條件 — 帳號：可篩選來源是 iCloud or Gmail\n: Other filter criteria — Account: can filter sources from iCloud or Gmail
translations.其他過濾條件 — 收件人：多個，但要加入到聯絡人，一般就是自己的多個帳號\n: Other Filter Conditions — Recipients: Multiple, but must be added to Contacts, usually your own multiple accounts
translations.另一個生活通知是信用卡帳單通知；設定類似簡訊，當收到電子郵件時也能觸發捷徑自動化: Another life notification is the credit card bill alert; set up similarly to SMS, the shortcut automation can add a reminder when an email is received. However, since automation is not yet available for third-party apps, only Apple's [Mail app](https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/%E9%83%B5%E4%BB%B6/id1108187098){:target="_blank"} can trigger it.
translations.只要坐等新簡訊進來，符合包含的關鍵字就會自動轉發(就算手機沒解鎖)，礙於目前功能: As long as you wait for a new message to arrive, it will be automatically forwarded if it contains the specified keyword (even if the phone is locked). Due to current feature limitations, you need to create a shortcut for each keyword, and the same message containing multiple keywords will be sent multiple times.
translations.同前文自動轉發簡訊介紹的何時條件，這邊設定 `訊息內容包含「送達」` 和改成 `: Following the previous SMS auto-forwarding introduction on the timing condition, here set the condition to `Message contains "delivered"` and change to `Run Immediately`.
translations.同前述，只要坐等新簡訊進來，符合包含的關鍵字就會自動建立提醒事項(就算手機沒解鎖: As mentioned earlier, once a new message arrives containing the specified keyword, a reminder will be automatically created (even if the phone is locked). Due to current feature limitations, a separate shortcut must be created for each keyword, and if a single message contains multiple keywords, reminders will be created multiple times.
translations.同理，你也可以改用 `「傳送訊息」` 或 `「發送電子郵件」` 的動作(如第三張: Similarly, you can use the "Send Message" or "Send Email" action (as shown in the third image) to forward the received message content to SMS (if iCloud Messages is not enabled, SMS fees may apply) or Email.
translations.向右滑找到＆點擊 `「捷徑輸入」`\n: Swipe right to find and tap `「捷徑輸入」`
translations.向右滑找到＆點擊 `「重複項目」`\n: Swipe right to find and tap `「Repeat Items」`
translations.回到上方點擊 `「重複項目」` 輸入匡，將原本選擇的 `「電子郵件」` 改為 `: Go back to the `Repeat Items` input box above and change the originally selected `Email` to `Title`.
translations.回到上方點擊 將 `「捷徑輸入」傳送給「XXX」` ，的 `「捷徑輸入」` 輸入: Go back to the top and click the `“Shortcut Input”` field in `“Send ‘Shortcut Input’ to ‘XXX’”`.
translations.回到捷徑自動化首頁可以查看、暫停、修改這則捷徑。\n: Go back to the Shortcuts automation home to view, pause, or edit this shortcut.
translations.因為 Apple 郵件是用擷取的 (非 iCloud 的話)，因此信件收取也不會: Because Apple Mail uses fetching (if not iCloud), email retrieval is not immediate and will be delayed for a while.
translations.在搜尋匡輸入 `「如果」` 下滑找到＆點擊 `「如果」`\n: In the search box, type `「如果」`, scroll down and tap `「如果」`
translations.在搜尋匡輸入 `「提醒」` 下滑找到＆點擊 `「新增提醒事項」`\n: In the search bar, type `「提醒」`, scroll down, and tap `「新增提醒事項」`.
translations.在搜尋匡輸入 `「重複」` 下滑找到＆點擊 `「重複每一個」`\n: In the search bar, type `“Repeat”`, scroll down and tap `“Repeat Each”`
translations.在搜尋匡輸入「提醒」下滑找到＆點擊「新增提醒事項」\n: In the search bar, type "Reminder," scroll down, and tap "Add Reminder."
translations.在這個詐騙簡訊滿天飛的年代很怕家中長輩小孩收到詐騙簡訊不小心輸入資料被騙，或是長: In this era full of scam text messages, it's worrisome that elderly family members or children might receive scam texts and accidentally input information, leading to fraud. Also, elders may not understand SMS verification for account security and need remote help to receive messages and complete verification. Additionally, there's concern about children using their phones for unauthorized activities.
translations.如果想轉發到 Line 訊息則在搜尋匡輸入 `「line」` 搜尋 Line 提: If you want to forward to Line messages, enter `「line」` in the search box to find the shortcut function provided by Line, then select Line's `「Send Message」` and choose the target recipient.
translations.實測即使手機在未解鎖待命狀態也都能正確執行發送。\n\n: Tested and confirmed that the sending works correctly even when the phone is locked and on standby.
translations.我目前使用 Apple 內建的提醒事項當做生活事項的待辦管理工具，所以我也希望那: I currently use Apple’s built-in Reminders app to manage my to-do tasks, so I also want to integrate other reminders into it, such as package arrivals at convenience stores and credit card payment notifications.
translations.拖曳 `將「提醒事項」加入「提醒事項」並「不提示」` 動作到 `若「標題」「包含: Drag the action `Add "Reminder" to "Reminders" and "Do Not Notify"` under `If "Title" "Contains" "Credit Card Statement"` (inside)
translations.拖曳 `若「重複結果」「狀況」` 動作到 `重複「捷徑輸入」中的每個項目` 下面: Drag the `If "Repeat Result" "Condition"` action inside and below `Repeat Each Item in "Shortcut Input"`
translations.捷徑 Shortcut (舊稱 Workflow) 是 iOS 12 開始的新功: Shortcut (formerly Workflow) is a new feature introduced in iOS 12; it allows you to create a series of tasks that can be executed with one tap or set to trigger automatically in the background.
translations.捷徑自動化執行完會跳通知，這通知無法關閉。\n\n: Shortcut automation execution will trigger a notification that cannot be disabled.
translations.新增完會抓錯變數，選擇 `重複「已調整日期」中的每個項目` 的 `「已調整日期」: After adding, it will pick the wrong variable. In the input box for `Repeat with Each Item in "Adjusted Date"`, select `Clear Variable` for `"Adjusted Date"`.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"} .
translations.本篇只介紹 3 個我覺得很實用方便又簡單的應用場景。\n\n: This article only introduces 3 practical, convenient, and simple use cases that I find very useful.
translations.沒問題點擊右上角「完成」\n**如果點完成沒反應那可能是遇到 iOS Bug，可:
No problem, tap "Done" at the top right corner.  
**If tapping Done does nothing, it might be an iOS bug. You can ignore it and just tap Back to return to the home screen.**
translations.清除後，選擇 `重複「項目」中的每個項目` 的 `「項目」` 輸入匡，選擇 `「: After clearing, select `Repeat Each Item in "Items"` and in the `"Items"` input box, choose `Shortcut Input`
translations.現在已完成了幾個基礎的自動化整合功能，簡單幾個步驟節省你日常的心力；其他進階串接: Several basic automation integrations have been completed, saving you daily effort with just a few simple steps. More advanced connections, such as calling APIs to integrate with Notion or more complex setups, are also technically feasible. **It's not the technology that's lacking, but your imaginative automation ideas!**
translations.現在有新的郵件、Apple 郵件擷取完，裡面有信用卡帳單標題的話就會自動建立囉！: When there is a new email and Apple Mail has finished fetching, if it contains a credit card statement title, a reminder will be created automatically!
translations.當收到簡訊包含「http」時轉發訊息「內容」到 Line 給我\n: When receiving an SMS containing "http", forward the message "content" to me on Line
translations.當收到簡訊包含「已在」時新增提醒事項 (Coupang 是用「已在」)\n: Add Reminder When Receiving SMS Containing "已在" (Coupang Uses "已在")
translations.當收到簡訊包含「認證碼」時轉發訊息「內容」到 Line 給我\n: Forward message "content" to Line when receiving an SMS containing "verification code"
translations.當收到簡訊包含「送達」時新增提醒事項 (一般都是「送達」)\n: Add a Reminder When Receiving an SMS Containing "Delivered" (Usually "Delivered")
translations.當收到簡訊包含「通知」時轉發訊息「內容」到 Line 給我\n: Forward the message "Content" to Line when receiving an SMS containing "Notification"
translations.當收到簡訊包含「驗證碼」時轉發訊息「內容」到 Line 給我\n: When receiving an SMS containing "verification code," forward the message "content" to me on Line
translations.確認「設定」->「郵件」->「帳號」->「擷取新資料」設定為擷取或推播。\n\n: Confirm that "Settings" -> "Mail" -> "Accounts" -> "Fetch New Data" is set to Fetch or Push.
translations.確認最終位置圖如上圖三，如果不對請刪除重複跟如果並從上一步重新操作\n: Confirm the final location map as shown in Figure 3 above. If incorrect, please delete duplicates and "if" conditions, then redo from the previous step.
translations.確認最終位置圖如上圖二，如果不對請刪除重複跟如果並從上一步重新操作\n: Confirm the final location map as shown in Figure 2 above. If it is incorrect, please delete duplicates and redo from the previous step.
translations.確認最終設定結果是：\n`當我收到包含「XXX」的訊息時，將訊息作為輸入接收，L:
Confirm the final setup result as:  
`When I receive a message containing "XXX", take the message as input, and Line sends the "content" to "XXX"`
translations.自動執行條件的部分目前只限 iOS 自身或自家的 App，例如：特定時間、抵達、: The automatic trigger conditions are currently limited to iOS itself or its own apps, such as specific time, arriving at or leaving a location, detecting NFC, receiving messages or emails, connecting to Wi-Fi, battery level, Do Not Disturb mode, detecting sounds, and so on.
translations.舉例：批次擷取到三封信，有一封家樂福通知信、信用卡帳單信、Uber 通知信，這三: Example: When batch fetching three emails—one from Carrefour, one credit card statement, and one Uber notification—all are input into the shortcut; therefore, we need an additional step to filter out the emails with the keywords we want.
translations.蘋果自家的服務，不需要像早期轉發簡訊要越獄；捷徑功能，免越獄，免安裝奇怪的第三方: Apple's own services no longer require jailbreaking to forward messages like in the past; the Shortcuts feature works without jailbreaking or installing strange third-party apps.
translations.跟訊息一則一則觸發不一樣，郵件的觸發是批次擷取，因此只要那批次有出現關鍵字標題的: Unlike messages triggered one by one, email triggers work in batches. So, as long as the batch contains emails with the keyword in the subject, all those new emails will be included together.
translations.跳出下方選單，將原本選擇的 `「訊息」` 改為 `「內容」`\n: Open the menu below and change the original selection from `「Messages」` to `「Content」`
translations.輸入你希望多久到期提醒的天數，這邊我輸入 3 天\n: Enter the number of days before expiration you want to be reminded; here I enter 3 days
translations.這時候位置會是錯的\n: The location will be incorrect at this time.
translations.選擇 `加上 0 「秒」` ，的 `「秒」` 輸入匡，改成 `「天」`\n: Change the "seconds" input box in `Add 0 "seconds"` to `"days"`
translations.選擇 `將「日期」加上 0 秒` 的 `「日期」` 輸入匡\n: Select the `Date` input box for `Add 0 seconds to Date`
translations.選擇 `於時間 下午 2:00` 的 `「下午 2:00」` 輸入匡，選擇變數: Select the `At Time 2:00 PM` `“2:00 PM”` input box, then choose the variable `“Adjusted Date”`
translations.選擇 `於時間「下午 2:00」` 的 `「下午 2:00」` 輸入匡，選擇變數: Select the `At Time "2:00 PM"` input box for `"2:00 PM"` and choose the variable `"Adjusted Date"`
translations.郵件的設定相對較複雜一點，因為是批次擷取所以還需要再次篩選一次，然後把篩選結果建: The email setup is relatively more complex because it involves batch fetching, requiring an additional filtering step before creating reminders from the filtered results.
translations.都沒問題後點擊右上角「完成」\n**如果點完成沒反應那可能是遇到 iOS Bug:
After confirming everything is correct, tap "Done" at the top right corner.  
**If tapping Done does nothing, it might be an iOS bug. You can ignore it and just tap Back to return to the home screen.**
translations.除了 iOS 自帶 App 的捷徑功能，這幾年蘋果也將 Siri Shortcu: Besides the built-in Shortcuts feature in iOS apps, Apple has also opened Siri Shortcut / App Intents to developers in recent years, allowing third-party apps to integrate some functions into Shortcuts for users to combine and use.
translations.首先我們要先設定提醒事項的到期日，新增一個日期變數，計算當收到訊息的時間開始 +: First, we need to set the due date for the reminder by adding a date variable that calculates the reminder time as the received message time plus a certain duration.
translations.點擊 `將「捷徑輸入」加入「提醒事項」並不提示` ，的 `「捷徑輸入」` 輸入匡: Click the input box of `Shortcut Input` in `Add "Shortcut Input" to Reminders without Prompt`.
translations.點擊 `將「提醒事項」加入「提醒事項」並「不提示」` ，的第一個 `「提醒事項」: Click the first `「提醒事項」` input box in `Add "Reminder" to "Reminders" and "Do Not Notify"`.
translations.點擊 `若「標題」「狀況」` 的 `「標題」` 輸入匡，改選擇 `「包含」` ，: Click the `Title` input box in the `If "Title" "Condition"` section, change the condition to `Contains`, enter `Credit Card Statement`, and tap "Done" on the keyboard.
translations.點擊 `若「重複結果」「狀況」` 的 `「重複結果」` 輸入匡，下方改選擇 `「: Click the `“Repeat Results”` input box next to `If “Repeat Results” “Condition”`, then change the selection below to `“Title”`. Click the “X” next to the menu to close it.
translations.點擊右上角「完成」\n: Tap "Done" at the top right corner
translations.點擊選單旁邊「X」關閉\n: Click the "X" next to the menu to close it
